how_it_works: Veiled items drop with hidden modifiers in the Betrayal league mechanic. Kill or capture Syndicate members with the 'Research' division reward to unveil mods. Each unveil adds a veiled mod to Jun's crafting bench (max 3 unveils per mod to unlock all tiers).
tips: Prioritize unveiling mods with multiple valuable tiers — each unveil unlocks the next tier at the bench.
Jun's division in Betrayal determines which mods she can offer: always keep Jun in Research for max unlock rate.
Some veiled mods are build-defining (movement speed on boots, prefixes on weapons) — target Syndicate members who guard specific item slots.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Movement Speed (Boots)
mods.notes: The premier boot suffix. Best-in-slot for nearly every build. Three unveils required to unlock tier 3.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Prefix — # to Maximum Life (Body Armour)
mods.notes: Strong flat life prefix. Competes with influenced mods but accessible via unveiling.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Recover Life on Kill (Helmet)
mods.notes: Sustain-oriented. Best value on helmets with dense pack farming.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Prefix — # to Attributes (Amulet)
mods.notes: Solves attribute requirements while freeing up other item slots.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Onslaught on Kill (Gloves)
tiers: 15% chance to gain Onslaught for 3 sec on Kill
20% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 sec on Kill
25% chance to gain Onslaught for 5 sec on Kill
mods.best_tier: 25% chance to gain Onslaught for 5 sec on Kill
mods.notes: Free Onslaught uptime without needing flasks or passive nodes. Useful for fast-mapping builds.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Mana Regeneration Rate (Ring)
mods.notes: Niche value. Outclassed by mana-on-hit or other sustain mechanics in most builds.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Prefix — #% increased Spell Damage (Sceptre/Staff)
mods.notes: Competes with other prefixes but useful for off-hand caster weapons where attack speed doesn't matter.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Recover Mana on Kill (Belt)
mods.notes: Situational. Only relevant if mana sustain is the build's only pressure point.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Prefix — # to Maximum Energy Shield (Body Armour)
mods.notes: Flat ES prefix. Strong on CI and hybrid builds. Rivals influenced body armour prefixes.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Chaos Resistance (Ring/Amulet)
mods.notes: Chaos res is the hardest resistance to cap. A veiled chaos res suffix can solve the problem on one item.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Prefix — #% increased Attack Speed (Gloves)
mods.notes: Attack speed prefix on gloves is relatively rare — veiled mod provides a reliable source.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Prefix — #% increased Critical Strike Chance (Weapon)
mods.notes: Useful on weapons that lack built-in crit. Competes with damage prefixes so slot planning matters.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Flask Charges on Hit (Belt)
tiers: 4% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you are Hit
5% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you are Hit
6% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you are Hit
mods.best_tier: 6% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you are Hit
mods.notes: Getting hit is required. Mostly for builds that take lots of small hits (block builds, ES recharge builds).

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Elemental Resistance (Body Armour)
mods.notes: Single element only. Less impactful than Shaper/Elder influenced all-res rolls, but still useful for targeted res capping.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Prefix — Culling Strike on Hit (Gloves)
best_for: Any build that struggles with last ~10% boss HP
mods.notes: Instant kill at 10% HP. Single tier — three unveils all unlock the same effect. Extremely powerful for boss farming.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Cannot be Poisoned (Helmet/Boots/Gloves)
mods.notes: Useful in content with heavy poison sources. Single tier. Frees up a flask slot.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Nearby Enemies take Increased Elemental Damage (Weapon)
tiers: Nearby Enemies take 8–10% increased Elemental Damage
Nearby Enemies take 11–13% increased Elemental Damage
Nearby Enemies take 14–16% increased Elemental Damage
mods.best_tier: Nearby Enemies take 14–16% increased Elemental Damage
mods.notes: More multiplier on nearby enemies — significant DPS gain. 'Nearby' is roughly melee range.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Prefix — # to Maximum Life (Helmet)
mods.notes: Flat life prefix on helmets is valuable since helmets prefer suffix slots for elemental/chaos res and life on kill.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Tailwind on Critical Strike (Boots)
tiers: You have Tailwind if you have dealt a Critical Strike Recently
mods.best_tier: You have Tailwind if you have dealt a Critical Strike Recently
mods.notes: Tailwind provides 10% increased Action Speed — equivalent to ~10% more DPS and movement speed. Best-in-slot boot suffix for crit builds.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Suffix — Elusive on Critical Strike (Boots)
mods.notes: Elusive provides 15% less damage taken and 30% increased Movement/Action Speed for its duration. Strong defensive option.

mods.mod_name: Veiled Prefix — # to Armour and Evasion Rating (Shield)
mods.notes: Niche. Most shield builds prefer raw life, block, or ES — this dual-defence flat roll rarely competes.
